lib/.description: Project uses Clean Architecture with features organized into data/domain/presentation layers. Each feature has infrastructure layer for external concerns. Uses Riverpod for state management, GraphQL for API, and AWS Cognito for authentication.

pubspec.yaml.description: pubspec.yaml already includes connectivity_plus: ^6.1.3, flutter_local_notifications: ^16.3.2, and workmanager: ^0.5.2 which are needed for offline-first architecture. Only need to add sqflite, drift, and path_provider.

lib/app/di/.description: Dependency injection uses get_it package with modular approach. Each feature has its own DI module (e.g., auth_module.dart, core_module.dart). Need to create offline_module.dart for offline/sync services.

lib/features/offline/presentation/widget.description: OfflineBanner widget implements prominent offline mode indicator with errorContainer styling (orange/amber), Watches connectivityProvider and syncStatusProvider, Uses WidgetsBindingObserver to reappear on app foreground, Shows pending operations badge conditionally, Different styling from sync_status_banner.dart (primaryContainer blue vs errorContainer orange/amber)
